CustomField.description: Number of days between order creation and approval/denial
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Global_Partner__c)), IF( ISBLANK(Approved_Denied_Date__c), TODAY() - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate), Approved_Denied_Date__c - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) ), NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days between order creation and approval/denial
CustomField.label: Response Time (Days)
